ValidationRule.description: Measurement types need to match at TD1 and TD2.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISNULL(APHA_TestDay1Avian__c) <> ISNULL(APHA_TestDay2Avian__c) || ISNULL( APHA_TestDay1Bovine__c ) <> ISNULL( APHA_TestDay2Bovine__c ) || ISNULL( APHA_TestDay1DIVA__c ) <> ISNULL( APHA_TestDay2DIVA__c )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The same measurement types are needed for both test days.
